label: Transparent Pilea motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Pilea transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a compact pilea peperomioides leaf cluster, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: round coin-shaped pilea leaves in varied fresh greens, thin green stems radiating from a compact base, visible circular leaf veins and slight glossy botanical texture, a tiny mound of pale potting soil at the stem base only, houseplant shelf neutral feeling without showing a pot or shelf.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural soft studio light.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; no cropping; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: clean compact finance-system mood, bright but restrained, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: round green pilea leaves, deeper green stems, pale soil beige, houseplant shelf neutrals only; do not use magenta in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no props, no pot, no shelf, no second plant, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible transparent Pilea motif is the source reference for colors, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Pilea".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: compact finance system for cashflow, portfolio, ledger, and budget operations; dense, calm, precise, operational, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: round fresh green pilea leaves, deeper green stems, pale soil beige, leaf highlight yellow-green, houseplant shelf warm off-white, soft clay-beige neutrals, charcoal soil text. Include restrained compact finance accents only by using motif greens and soil neutrals, not generic blue or purple.
Layout: polished product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small pilea motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ピレア", "資産推移", "残高", "取引".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, account balance cards, ledger table, cashflow chart, portfolio bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle circular leaf-vein texture, round coin-leaf chart marks, fine pale soil speckles as dividers, houseplant shelf edge borders, compact 8px card rhythm.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no purple/blue finance default colors, no watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible Pilea motif and the visible Morphous Pilea light design-system board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Pilea" with the same compact finance-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: compact finance system for cashflow, portfolio, ledger, and budget operations; night-mode accounting dashboard, dense, calm, precise, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep soil-charcoal backgrounds, dark leaf green panels, fresh pilea green primary controls, leaf highlight yellow-green chart accents, pale soil text highlights, warm shelf-neutral borders. Avoid generic blue/purple finance colors and neon colors.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small pilea motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ピレア", "資産推移", "残高", "取引".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, account balance cards, ledger table, cashflow chart, portfolio bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark circular leaf-vein texture, round coin-leaf chart marks, pale soil speckle panels, houseplant shelf edge borders, compact 8px card rhythm.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no unrelated colors, no pure black flat background, no blue/purple gradients, no watermark.
